hero.title: Track Ledger
hero.subtitle: Log GPS data
hero.description: Offline-first engineering GPS logger for mobile. Track Ledger records raw GNSS points for your paths—no smoothing. Set time- or distance-based sampling, pause and resume, then export from a track summary or the track list (CSV; GPX and GeoJSON with Premium). Use the Map tab to overlay tracks on OpenStreetMap tiles.
hero.structuredDataDescription: Track Ledger — offline-first GPS/GNSS track logger for iOS and Android. Record raw points, elevation profiles, OSM map overlay, export CSV (free) or GPX/GeoJSON (Premium). Android com.zuki.apps.trackledger by Zuki Apps.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: Please read these Terms of Use carefully before using Track Ledger. By accessing or using our service, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the app.

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.content: These Terms of Use ("Terms") govern your access to and use of Track Ledger ("Service", "App", "we", "us", or "our"), a GPS/GNSS track logging application operated by Zuki Apps ("Company"). By downloading, installing, accessing, or using the Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms and our Privacy Policy.
section1.content2: If you are using the Service on behalf of an organization, you represent and warrant that you have the authority to bind that organization to these Terms.

section2.title: 2. Description of Service
section2.content: Track Ledger is a mobile application that records location-related data for paths you choose to log. The Service includes:
items: Recording of GNSS/GPS fixes and related metadata (e.g. accuracy, speed) on your device
Configurable sampling (time- or distance-based), pause and resume, and track summaries
Export and sharing of track data (e.g. CSV; GPX and GeoJSON where enabled)
Map visualization using third-party map tiles (e.g. OpenStreetMap) for completed tracks
Optional in-app purchases or ads as described in the app

section19.title: 19. Contact Information
section19.content: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us:

privacy.title: Privacy Policy

section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
section1.content: Track Ledger processes location data (GNSS/GPS) when you start recording, along with app settings and track metadata needed to run the app. Depending on your device and configuration, the app may use analytics or crash reporting to improve stability (often via third-party SDKs). Data you export or share is sent only when you explicitly choose export or share. Map tiles may be loaded from third-party providers when you use the Map feature.

section2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
section2.content: We use the information described above to provide recording, storage on your device, export/sharing features you trigger, and optional product improvement through aggregated diagnostics where enabled. We do not sell your personal track history as a product.

section3.title: 3. Information Sharing
section3.content: We do not sell your personal information. Data leaves your device when you export, share, or when required third-party services (e.g. map tile servers, app stores, analytics if enabled) process requests as part of normal app operation. See in-app notices and platform settings for controls where available.

section4.title: 4. Data Security
section4.content: We implement reasonable measures appropriate to a mobile app. Track data is stored in app storage on your device; you should use device security (passcode, encryption) as recommended by your platform vendor.

section5.title: 5. Your Rights
section5.content: Depending on your region, you may have rights to access, correct, or delete personal data, or to opt out of certain processing. You can delete tracks in the app, uninstall the app to remove local data, and contact us for privacy requests.

section8.title: 8. Contact Us
section8.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers about features, privacy, and billing.

items.question: What is Track Ledger?
items.answer: A simple GPS / GNSS track logger focused on data export and field use. It records your path as raw points with optional time- or distance-based sampling.

items.question: Is it a fitness or social app?
items.answer: No. There are no leaderboards, workouts, or social feeds. It's built for people who need reliable location logs and file exports.

items.question: Do I need an account?
items.answer: No. Everything is stored locally on your device.

items.question: Does it work offline?
items.answer: Yes. Recording and viewing saved tracks work without internet. The Map tab needs network to load OpenStreetMap tiles.

items.question: When does the app use my location?
items.answer: Only while you have an active recording (and optionally in the background if you have Premium and background recording enabled).

items.question: Why did recording pause when I switched apps?
items.answer: On the free plan, new GPS points are logged only while Track Ledger is in the foreground. Premium with background recording enabled continues logging when you leave the app.

items.question: What does "raw GNSS, no smoothing" mean?
items.answer: Points are saved as the device reports them. We don't apply a smoothing filter — you get the honest trace for your own analysis.

items.question: How many tracks can I save?
items.answer: Free: up to 10 completed tracks. Premium: unlimited (or a higher cap you choose in Settings).

items.question: What happens when the ledger is full?
items.answer: In Settings → Ledger you choose: automatically remove oldest tracks, or refuse new recordings until you delete tracks manually.

items.question: Which formats are free?
items.answer: CSV export and share are always available.

items.question: Can I share a track to another app?
items.answer: Yes — use Share from track summary or Ledger. The system share sheet opens (Mail, Files, AirDrop, etc.).

items.title: GPS quality
items.description: Wait for a good fix before tapping Start — check GPS accuracy on the recording screen. - Open sky beats urban canyons and dense tree cover. - Raw points are logged without smoothing — if accuracy is poor, you'll see it in the data (by design).

items.title: Sampling strategy
items.description: | Scenario | Suggested setting | |----------|-------------------| | Walking / hiking | Time: every 5–10 s | | Driving / vehicle survey | Distance: every 25–50 m | | Long battery life | Wider intervals (time or distance) | | Detailed path capture | Tighter intervals (more points, larger files) |

items.title: Battery
items.description: Enable Keep screen on only when you need to watch the screen continuously. - Wider sampling intervals reduce CPU and GPS wakeups. - Background recording (Premium) uses more battery — expected for continuous logging.

items.title: Field workflow
items.description: 1. Create a project per job site or client. 2. Record with a consistent sampling preset per project type. 3. Export CSV in the field for quick checks; use GPX/GeoJSON back at the office. 4. Use Map tab to compare multiple passes on the same corridor.

items.title: Data hygiene
items.description: Rename tracks right after stop while context is fresh. - Delete test runs so you don't hit the free-tier ledger limit. - Premium users: set max completed tracks and when full policy before long field seasons.

items.title: Exports & GIS
items.description: CSV — columns include coordinates, time, elevation (as logged). Open in Excel, Python, R. - GPX — import to QGIS, Gaia GPS, or custom pipelines. - GeoJSON — drop into web maps or `ogr2ogr` workflows.

items.title: Premium worth it if you…
items.description: Need background logging while using camera or notes apps - Export to GPX or GeoJSON regularly - Want auto-stop at a fixed distance or duration - Record more than 10 completed tracks One-time purchase — no subscription.

privacy.title: 隐私政策
privacy.description: 了解我们如何保护您的数据

terms.title: 服务条款
terms.description: 阅读我们的条款和条件

q1.question: 什么是追踪账本？
q1.answer: 一个简单的 GPS / GNSS 轨迹记录器，专注于数据导出和现场使用。它通过可选的基于时间或距离的采样将您的路径记录为原始点。

q2.question: 它是健身应用程序还是社交应用程序？
q2.answer: 不。没有排行榜、锻炼或社交信息。它是为需要可靠的位置日志和文件导出的人们而构建的。

q3.question: 我需要一个帐户吗？
q3.answer: 不会。所有内容都存储在您的本地设备上。

q4.question: 可以离线使用吗？
q4.answer: 是的。无需互联网即可录制和查看已保存的曲目。地图选项卡需要网络来加载 OpenStreetMap 图块。

q5.question: 该应用程序何时使用我的位置？
q5.answer: 仅当您正在进行活动录制时（如果您启用了 Premium 并启用了后台录制，则可以选择在后台进行录制）。

q6.question: 为什么切换应用程序时录音会暂停？
q6.answer: 在免费计划中，仅当 Track Ledger 位于前台时才会记录新的 GPS 点。 Premium 启用后台录制后，当您离开应用程序时会继续记录。

additionalHelp.title: 需要更多帮助吗？
additionalHelp.description: 如果您找不到所需的答案，或者遇到技术问题，请随时与我们联系。我们随时为您提供帮助，通常会在 24-48 小时内回复。
